curation_notes: The advisory references two commits for issue #4127. Commit 958cf01 fixes the primary SQL injection in updateNullByEmptyString (SysUserMapper.xml) by replacing ${fieldName} interpolation with hardcoded if/else checks for 'email' and 'phone'. Commit 8632a83 deprecates the queryTableDictByKeysAndFilterSql method in SysDictMapper.java, which maps to a query in SysDictMapper.xml that also uses ${filterSql} direct interpolation. Pre-patch commit is 01602bd (parent of first fix) so both vulnerabilities are present. SysDictMapper.xml added as a sibling location since it uses the same ${...} MyBatis string interpolation pattern in the same mapper/xml directory.
